creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 178206
Patch to update lang/scala-docs to version 2.12.1

Hi,

I've included a patch that updates lang/scala-docs to version 2.12.1.
It was tested locally without problems. Portlint hints at defining a license but to me it is not clear what license applies to the scala documentation.

Regards,

Jens
